name: Oatmeal Carrot Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
To make cookies: Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease baking sheets with shortening.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the shortening, sugar, orange juice, orange peel, and vanilla. Beat until well blended.
Add carrots; beat until well incorporated.
In another bowl, mix oats, flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, allspice, and nutmeg.
Mix into creamed mixture on low speed just until combined.
Fold in raisins and walnuts.
Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto prepared baking sheets.
Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned. Do not overbake. Cool on baking sheets for 2 minutes before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
To make frosting: In a large bowl, beat together cream cheese, shortening, powdered sugar, milk, and orange extract until smooth. Frost cooled cookies.
Source: Milwaukee Sentinel
